title: Polish Fish Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful pilaf dish made with fish, polish sausage, and molten cheese.
instructions: Cook the pilaf according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced polish sausage to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the fish to the skillet, skin side up. Cook for 2-3 minutes, then flip and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Flake the cooked fish into the pilaf and stir to combine.
Top with shredded molten cheese and return to the oven for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
